sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the image, the figure has moved down. The red blocks are now at the bottom (two red feet) and one on the left side. The green frame is embedded in the figure. Let me check the segmentation.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('W', 'N', 'R', 'G'):
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"{n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
print("\nTotal green:", sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N'))
print("Total red:", sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
